# children(matching:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a query for all direct children of the element matching the type you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
func children(matching type: XCUIElement.ElementType) -> XCUIElementQuery
```

## Querying descendant elements

- **descendants(matching:)**: Returns a query for all descendants of the element matching the type you specify.

items.description: Returns a query for all descendants of the element matching the type you specify.
items.name: descendants(matching:)
